title: Neuritis in Musicians: 8 Teas to the Rescue
description: Ginkgo biloba teas have been used to help alleviate neuritis symptoms. Neuritis is inflammation of the nerves, which can cause pain, numbness, and weakness in the hands and feet. Ginkgo biloba teas contain flavonoids, terpenoids, and bilobalide, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These compounds may help reduce inflammation and improve blood flow to the nerves, relieving symptoms of neuritis. If you're considering using Ginkgo biloba teas to help with neuritis, st...
